title: selaginella horizontalis
intro: Selaginella horizontalis, also known as Spike Moss, is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Spike Moss include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a popular herbal remedy for promoting overall well-being. Spike Moss can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
